children.text: the applicable amount specified in subsection (b); or
the amount determined in accordance with subsection (c).
If the total amount appropriated under for a fiscal year exceeds $100,000,000, the amount referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be $300,000 for the fiscal year.section 300ee–24(a) of this title

If the total amount appropriated under for a fiscal year equals or exceeds $50,000,000, but is less than $100,000,000, the amount referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be $200,000 for the fiscal year.section 300ee–24(a) of this title
If the total amount appropriated under for a fiscal year is less than $50,000,000, the amount referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be $100,000 for the fiscal year.section 300ee–24(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the amount determined under paragraph (2); and

children.label: A
children.text: an amount equal to 50 percent of the amounts appropriated pursuant to ; andsection 300ee–24(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the population of the State involved; divided by

children.label: ii
children.text: the population of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: an amount equal to 50 percent of the amounts appropriated pursuant to ; andsection 300ee–24(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the number of additional cases of acquired immune deficiency syndrome reported to and confirmed by the Secretary for the State involved for the most recent fiscal year for which such data is available; divided by

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of additional cases of such syndrome reported to and confirmed by the Secretary for the United States for such fiscal year.

children.heading: Disposition of certain funds appropriated for allotments
children.label: d Disposition of certain funds appropriated for allotments

children.text: Amounts described in paragraph (2) shall be allotted by the Secretary to States receiving payments under for the fiscal year (other than any State referred to in paragraph (2)(C)). Such amounts shall be allotted according to a formula established by the Secretary. The formula shall be equivalent to the formula described in this section under which the allotment under for the State for the fiscal year involved was determined.section 300ee–11(a) of this titlesection 300ee–11(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the failure of any State to submit an application under ;section 300ee–13 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the failure, in the determination of the Secretary, of any State to prepare within a reasonable period of time such application in compliance with such section; or

children.label: C
children.text: any State informing the Secretary that the State does not intend to expend the full amount of the allotment made to the State.
